evals.name: explicit-invocation-trigger
evals.expected_output: skill-fix starts interview immediately on explicit invocation.

assertions.text: Q1 question is presented (which skill/phase was unexpected)
No confirmation question shown (explicit invocation bypasses it)
Interview proceeds without waiting for confirmation

evals.name: implicit-trigger-both-conditions
evals.prompt: discover スキルがおかしい動きをしている。直したい。
evals.expected_output: skill-fix shows one confirmation question (both skill name + intent verb present).

assertions.text: Question asks whether to use skill-fix flow
Does not start interview before confirmation

evals.name: implicit-trigger-skill-only
evals.prompt: discover スキルについて教えて。
evals.expected_output: No skill-fix trigger (skill name present but no intent verb).

assertions.text: No confirmation question shown (only skill name, no intent verb)

evals.name: implicit-trigger-intent-only
evals.expected_output: No skill-fix trigger (intent verb present but no specific skill name).

assertions.text: No confirmation question shown (intent verb without skill name)

evals.name: interview-3-questions-only
evals.expected_output: Exactly 3 interview questions (Q1, Q2, Q3) are asked, no more.

assertions.text: No Q4 or additional questions beyond Q3

evals.name: duplicate-check-4-class
evals.prompt: /atdd-kit:skill-fix after Q1=discover, Q2=persona listing broken, Q3=step3a-listing fails
evals.expected_output: Duplicate check performs 4-class evaluation and reports result.

assertions.text: Duplicate check executes before subagent dispatch

evals.name: exact-duplicate-no-dispatch
evals.expected_output: On exact duplicate detection, subagent is NOT dispatched.

evals.name: subagent-dispatch-non-blocking
evals.expected_output: Subagent dispatched, main session returns immediately without blocking.

assertions.text: Main session confirms it can continue with original work
No blocking wait for subagent completion

evals.name: parallel-suppression
evals.prompt: skill-fix triggered again while one subagent already running with same skill+phase
evals.expected_output: New subagent dispatch suppressed with notification of existing one.

assertions.text: Does not launch second subagent for same content

evals.name: failure-path-reporting
evals.expected_output: At next phase boundary, 1-line failure report is shown.

assertions.text: 1-line failure report format: 'skill-fix dispatch failed: #N (phase=...) / link: ...'
